name: hybrid-loops
description: Hybrid loops — a design pattern where LLM judgment and deterministic code form a mutually-generative cycle, not a pipeline. Each half produces the next half's working surface. Diagnostic skill plus three MCP servers (cal_log, metacog, schemaforge).

plugins.name: hybrid-loops
plugins.description: Design surfaces where LLM judgment and deterministic code alternate as mutually-generative layers — each producing the working surface the other operates over. Lens → substrate → gate → reasoner → action, with calibration and metabolism closing the loop. Stacks at runtime and during development. Diagnostic-first skill plus three MCP servers: cal_log (calibration logger), metacog (cognitive-bias auditor), schemaforge (compress+verify schema discovery).
